query:
SELECT DISTINCT customerName, customerExternalId
FROM services
WHERE (
  customerName LIKE '%Action Smart%' OR
  customerName LIKE '%Air Restore%' OR
  customerName LIKE '%Envest%' OR
  customerName LIKE '%Gateway%' OR
  customerName LIKE '%Salter%' OR
  customerName LIKE '%Spicers%'
)
AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
ORDER BY customerName;
